inputs: position and time data are accurate
sensory_synthesis.interpretation: The system appears to be functioning normally with the exception of abnormal current readings which could indicate a potential issue with the propulsion system or environmental factors.

internal_deliberation.thought: The abnormal current readings could be due to a malfunction in the propulsion system or external factors such as strong currents or underwater obstacles.

mission_assurance_check.failure_mode_prediction: The propulsion system may fail, causing the vehicle to drift or lose control.
mission_assurance_check.mitigation_strategy: Perform a system check to verify the propulsion system and adjust course if necessary.

decision.expected_outcome: The propulsion system will be verified and any issues will be addressed.

agent_reasoning.self_reflection: The system is currently operating within expected parameters, but the abnormal current readings require attention to ensure safe and effective navigation.
